strings.verification_needed: For security, your identity needs to be verified before making subscription changes.
strings.cancel_confirmation: Your subscription will remain active until the renewal date. After that, you'll lose access. Are you sure you want to cancel?
strings.refund_over_limit: Refund requests over $50 need to be reviewed by a billing specialist. Let me connect you.
strings.browsing_complete: Glad I could help with your subscriptions! Let me know if you need anything else.
